flowers.title: Spring Elegance
flowers.description: A delicate blend of peonies, tulips, and roses — perfect for springtime gifting and bright smiles.

flowers.title: Berry Chic
flowers.description: A stylish composition of roses, seasonal greenery, and vibrant berries — a bold and elegant floral statement.

flowers.title: Lavender Dream
flowers.description: A rich bouquet with lavender, lisianthus, and roses — ideal for those who love deep hues and gentle fragrance.

flowers.title: Peach Meadow
flowers.description: A soft and radiant arrangement of peach and blush roses with lush greenery in a straw basket.

flowers.title: Blush Romance
flowers.description: A premium bouquet of deep pink and ivory roses, complemented by silver eucalyptus.

bouquets.title: Peach Meadow
bouquets.description: A soft and radiant arrangement of peach and blush roses with lush greenery in a straw basket.

bouquets.title: Blush Romance
bouquets.description: A premium bouquet of deep pink and ivory roses, complemented by silver eucalyptus.

bouquets.title: Pastel Garden
bouquets.description: A pastel-toned mix of spray roses and greenery in a woven basket — gentle and airy.

bouquets.title: Tulip Charm
bouquets.description: A vivid bouquet of bright tulips and roses in a lavender box — cheerful and full of charm.

bouquets.title: Berry Bloom
bouquets.description: A lush mix of rich pink, purple, and cream blooms with textured greens.

bouquets.title: Sweet Whisper
bouquets.description: A charming spring bouquet with peonies, roses, and lilac-toned accents.

bouquets.title: Field Joy
bouquets.description: A rustic hand-tied bouquet of sunflowers and daisies — perfect for brightening the day.

bouquets.title: Soft Bloom
bouquets.description: A delicate bouquet of pink carnations and roses wrapped in satin paper.

bouquets.title: Rose Glow
bouquets.description: A graceful rose bouquet with warm peach notes and fresh greenery.

bouquets.title: Lilac Basket
bouquets.description: A soft basket arrangement with lilac accents and airy pastel flowers.

bouquets.title: Sunny Basket
bouquets.description: A cheerful floral mix with bright accents for a warm and joyful gift.

bouquets.title: Pink Harmony
bouquets.description: A balanced bouquet of pink blooms, roses, and soft seasonal greenery.

bouquets.title: Morning Bloom
bouquets.description: Fresh flowers in gentle colors, created for simple everyday beauty.

bouquets.title: Garden Smile
bouquets.description: A light floral composition with playful colors and soft green details.

bouquets.title: Cream Rose
bouquets.description: Cream and blush roses arranged in a clean elegant style.

bouquets.title: Purple Mood
bouquets.description: A deeper floral palette with purple accents and textured greenery.

feedback.text: Beautiful bouquet and very friendly service. The flowers looked fresh and elegant.
feedback.name: Emily Carter

feedback.text: The order was prepared quickly and the arrangement looked even better than expected.
feedback.name: Sophia Green

feedback.text: I loved the colors and packaging. Flora is now my favorite flower shop.
feedback.name: Olivia Stone
